Generated signal_library.yaml line 6: schema_version: 2.0.0. Legacy signal_library.yaml line 3: schema_version: 1.0.0. Generated promoted_signal_intelligence.yaml line 3: schema_version: 1.0.0. No governance approval for schema version advancement to 2.0.0 found in any authority file. Per prompt STOP condition (line 164): do not promote with schema_version 2.0.0 unless formally governed. Required action: set schema_version to 1.0.0 in promoted signal_library artefact, add regression test asserting the chosen version is deliberate.

Legacy signal_library.yaml lines 44-60: 2 override rules — (1) or_renal_ckd_stage_3: eGFR < 60.0 (absolute threshold) → at_risk; (2) or_renal_acute_imbalance: potassium > 5.2 (absolute threshold) → at_risk. Generated signal_library.yaml lines 50-61: 1 entirely different rule — or_creatinine_high_with_uacr_high: UACR above_max via comparator_type lab_range_boundary → at_risk. Both eGFR and potassium escalation rules are absent from generated package. Generated rule introduces lab_range_boundary comparator (not present in legacy). Same divergence mirrored in promoted_signal_intelligence.yaml lines 45-57. Since pkg_s24_creatinine_high_renal is runtime_loaded: true (mapping plan line 782), promoting with different override rules would change which patients receive at_risk escalation at runtime. Cursor must classify this per divergence policy (NO_DIFFERENCE / STRUCTURAL_ONLY / RICHNESS_GAIN_ONLY / BEHAVIOURAL_DIFFERENCE_LOW / BEHAVIOURAL_DIFFERENCE_HIGH / CLINICAL_ADJUDICATION_REQUIRED) before promotion. STOP if classified BEHAVIOURAL_DIFFERENCE_HIGH or CLINICAL_ADJUDICATION_REQUIRED.
